title: transport: parse_incoming silently drops malformed response, hanging caller
description: parse_incoming() in transport.rs returns None when a JSON-RPC response (has 'id' field) fails serde deserialization. The None causes the reader task to skip the event and not deliver anything on in_tx. Any caller that sent a request and is waiting for a Response event on the channel will hang indefinitely — there is no timeout and no error delivered. Trigger: the relay sends a response whose shape is valid JSON with an 'id' field but is not a well-formed JsonRpcResponse (e.g. missing 'jsonrpc' field or 'id' not a u64). Affected callers: GetKeyPackage, SubscribeRequest, and any future post-auth request-response flow in commands.rs.
